candidates.reasoning: The combination of subtropical broadleaf evergreen forest and the specific structure of the canopy trees is highly characteristic of the Annamite Range and northern highlands. The northern highlands of Thailand exhibit this same subtropical forest composition. Botanically, it is indistinguishable from the highlands of Laos and Vietnam in this specific image.
